title: GTA+
headline: GTA+
subtitle: This Month’s Benefits
content:
In addition to the recurring monthly GTA$500,000 deposited directly into your Maze Bank account, GTA+ Members who've signed up for this month (June 11—July 13) will also receive:

— The Ocelot Stromberg (Sports Classic)
— 60% off Hangars and their Upgrades and Modifications
— The Independence Day Jacket and Pants and Green Emissive Lady Liberty Mask
— 2X GTA$ & RP on Smuggler Sell Missions
— And more

Membership automatically renews monthly, cancel anytime. Visit rsg.ms/gtaplus for more info.
